description_long: This chaise features a robust wooden frame with a high, ornately contoured backrest and matching footboard, both showcasing a natural wood grain texture. The side rails are straight and connect the head and foot sections, providing structural stability. The seating area is topped with a single, thick mattress upholstered in a white fabric with a terrazzo-like pattern of scattered black, gray, and pale pink shapes. A single rectangular pillow, covered in plain white fabric, rests at the head of the chaise. The legs are straight, sturdy, and extend directly downward from the corners, giving the piece a solid, grounded appearance. The overall design is functional yet decorative, suitable for placement in parks, urban rest areas, or residential outdoor spaces.
description: A wooden chaise with a high, contoured backrest, terrazzo-patterned mattress, and a single white pillow. The frame is sturdy with straight legs and a decorative wood grain finish.
description_view_0: The backrest is prominently visible, showing its contoured, decorative shape and wood grain texture.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the chaise, the terrazzo-patterned mattress, and the straight wooden legs.
description_view_2: Front view highlights the mattress, pillow, and the symmetrical design of the backrest and footboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the mattress and pillow from the other side, emphasizing the consistent wood grain and structure.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and features a gently contoured, almost scalloped top edge, with a continuous wood grain pattern and no visible segmentation or decorative tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, rectangular, and made of the same wood as the frame, with no visible decorative elements or tapering.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery on the mattress is white with a terrazzo-style pattern, featuring irregular black, gray, and pink shapes scattered across the surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick mattress covering the seating area and one loose, rectangular white pillow placed at the head of the chaise.
